title: Va Macha Va Chennai Super Kings CSK Theme Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Va Macha Va IPL 2012 Song Track
By Bob Syed, Ganesan, Imtiaz Ghani, Karthik Srinivas.

Vettri Kodi Katta vaada
VInnai thaandi mutta vaada
Unnai vella yaarum illa
thuninju nillada

Thottathellaam sixer thaanda

Mattayaala aduchu adichu
pattayakalapuda

CHENNAI - ho
SUPER   - ho
KINGS   - HO
Chennai Super Kings HO

CHENNAI - ho
SUPER   - ho
KINGS   - HO
Chennai Super Kings HO

sooradhi sooran ellaam
unkitta thorka poraan
va va va

Vettri pala kottu thada
Yettu thikkum paakudhada
Aethiri mugam verkudhada
va....

Poraada thuninjavan nee
poraattam therinjavan nee
Poraadum neramidhu
va va va.

Nee adikum pandheduka
roket vittu thaedatume
Nee nenacha mudiyumada vaa

Sooraavaliya pola
suthi suthi adikanum
MInnala odi
ne runna kuvikanum

jaikanum jaikanum jaikanum
va va va

C Maamu
S Maamu
K Maamu
Chennai Super Kings .

Vettri Kodi Katta vaada
VInnai thaandimutta vaada
Unnai vella yaarum illa
thuninju nillada

Thottathellaam sixer thaanda

Mattayaala aduchu adichu
pattayakalapuda

raja muraliyada
adichaar namma hayden ada
20-20 king Dhoniyada
chennai super kings-u
vada vada

Six-u adicha pandhu parakum
bowling pota stemp-u agirum
fielding panna pori kelambum
sariya sariya sariya

Seeri varum pandhayellam
paayum puli pola neyum
paanchi paanchi catch-u
panna va va va

Kal-u rendum sakkaranda
Kai-u rendum rekkaiyada
parakum pandha yetti pidika
va ...

Yevugana pola neeyum
aeriyum pandhu stump-u ellam
boomi thaandi parakanumda
vaa va

Chennai Super kingsnna
Stadium-mey adhiranumda
Singam pola ne elundhu va

Vettri unna illaku
adhai ullathil niruthada

Chennai super kings-u
neenga champions-u da

jaikanum jaikanum jaikanum
va va va

K Maamu

jaikanum jaikanum jaikanum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Va Macha Va is a celebratory anthem for the Chennai Super Kings, emphasizing team spirit and victory.

Is there a movie associated with this song?

This song is not associated with any specific movie, but is a theme song for the IPL team Chennai Super Kings.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features contributions from various artists, but specific details about the singers and music director are not provided.

When was the song released?

Va Macha Va was released on April 4, 2012, coinciding with the IPL season.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Va Macha Va serves as a vibrant anthem for the Chennai Super Kings, encapsulating the excitement and energy of cricket. It conveys a message of unity and celebration among fans, making it perfect for lively occasions. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and motivation, inspiring listeners to rally behind their team. This theme song is not just music; it's a call to celebrate the spirit of sportsmanship.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Va Macha Va is the electrifying anthem that captures the spirit of the Chennai Super Kings, blending vibrant beats with a catchy chorus. This theme song, released during the IPL 2012 season, is a celebration of cricket and camaraderie, making it a must-listen for fans. Experience the thrill and energy that only Va Macha Va can deliver!
stanzaMeanings: Come on, buddy! IPL 2012 song track by Bob Syed, Ganesan, Imtiaz Ghani, Karthik Srinivas.
With the winning flag raised, let's go beyond the sky. No one can stop you, stand strong.
Everything we touch turns into a six. The excitement is about to explode.
CHENNAI - ho SUPER - ho KINGS - HO Chennai Super Kings HO
CHENNAI - ho SUPER - ho KINGS - HO Chennai Super Kings HO
Brave warriors, all the heroes will come to you, come on, come on, come on.
With many victories, we will rise. The face of the opponent will be defeated, come on...
You are the one who fights, you know the struggle. The fight is now, come on, come on.
You will hit hard and break the rocket. If you think, you can do it, come on.
Like a whirlwind, we need to attack. Run fast and show your skills.
We will win, we will win, we will win, come on, come on.
C Maamu S Maamu K Maamu Chennai Super Kings.
With the winning flag raised, let's go beyond the sky. No one can stop you, stand strong.
Everything we touch turns into a six. The excitement is about to explode.
The king of 20-20, Dhoni, is our pride. Chennai Super Kings, let's go, let's go.
When you hit a six, it will fly. When bowling, it will be a stamp, and fielding will be perfect.
All the good things will come like a tiger, you too catch the ball, come on, come on.
With both hands, catch the ball like a bird. You need to fly high and reach the ground.
Like a champion, you need to cross all boundaries, come on, come on.
The stadium belongs to Chennai Super Kings, like a lion, rise up.
Victory is yours, don't stop it in your heart.
Chennai Super Kings, you are the champions.
We will win, we will win, we will win, come on, come on.
C Maamu S Maamu K Maamu Chennai Super Kings.
We will win, we will win, we will win, come on, come on.
C Maamu Ho S Maamu Ho K Maamu HO Chennai Super Kings- Hoooo
